fields.label: Hero: heading
fields.value:
About
AsiaGreenWood.

fields.label: Hero: subtitle
fields.value: 东园森界 · Crafted by nature, guided by love

fields.label: Our name: heading
fields.value: About Asia Green Wood

fields.label: Our name: Asia
fields.value: Represents Asia's ancient heritage of coexisting harmoniously with forests and wood. By embracing wood, we reconnect with nature and revive a timeless cultural relationship between humanity and the forest — sharing this wisdom with the world.

fields.label: Our name: Green
fields.value: Symbolises our commitment to sustainability, green energy and environmental stewardship. It reflects our vision of nurturing a world that functions like a living garden — where forests thrive, ecosystems are respected, and growth is balanced with responsibility.

fields.label: Our name: Wood
fields.value: Embodies the promotion of wood culture worldwide. Wood is a natural resource meant to be used, yet treated with respect and responsibility. Through mindful and sustainable use, we honour nature while ensuring forests continue to flourish for future generations.

fields.label: Vision: heading
fields.value: Vision Statement · 愿景

fields.label: Vision: statement
fields.value: To lead a new era of timber — where love guides our work, nature is our partner, and sustainability becomes a way of life. Rooted in our Asian heritage, we grow in harmony with the Earth, our people, and the generations to come.

fields.label: Mission: heading
fields.value: Mission Statement · 使命

fields.label: Mission: statement
fields.value: At Asia Green Wood, our mission is to renew the sacred bond between people and nature — through how we work, the care we give, and the love we share.

fields.label: Mission: Respect the Earth
fields.value: Harvest with responsibility, protect our forests with heart, and embrace technologies that reduce carbon emissions by 90% — nurturing a cleaner, more balanced planet.

fields.label: Mission: Empower Our People
fields.value: Create a community filled with joy, meaning, and unity — where every person rediscovers love, purpose, and pride in what they do.

fields.label: Mission: Lead by Example
fields.value: Transform from the old ways to the new, proving that sustainability, compassion, and innovation can walk hand in hand.

fields.label: Mission: Inspire the Future
fields.value: Show the world that business can be kind — kind to the earth, kind to people, and kind to the generations yet to come.

fields.label: Mission: Honour Our Roots
fields.value: Celebrate our Asian heritage — blending traditional wisdom and modern innovation to craft a harmonious way forward.

fields.label: Sourcing: heading
fields.value: Sustainable wood sources.

fields.label: Sourcing: introduction
fields.value: At Asia Green Wood, we maintain complete control over our supply chain through vertical integration. By managing our own forest resources and an expert in-house timber extraction team, we ensure the highest standards of quality and environmental stewardship.

fields.label: Sourcing: traceability
fields.value: Materials are 100% traceable to the forest they come from — all the way down to the geolocation.

fields.label: Sourcing: EUDR
fields.value: Fully aligned with the EU Deforestation Regulation — guaranteed proof that our timber is legally sourced and not linked to deforestation or forest degradation.

fields.label: Sourcing: export grade
fields.value: BB-faced plywood panels shipped to 38 markets, specified to order.

fields.label: Sourcing: value chain
fields.value: From standing tree to finished panel, every step is managed in-house.

fields.label: Culture: heading
fields.value: Working with heart.

fields.label: Culture: paragraph 1
fields.value: At Asia Green Wood, we believe a company is only as strong as the bonds between its people. We don't just work together; we grow together like a family.

fields.label: Culture: paragraph 2
fields.value: Our culture is rooted in genuine care for one another — what we call “working with heart.” By fostering an environment of mutual respect and unwavering support, we ensure every team member feels valued, heard, and empowered to contribute to our sustainable future.

fields.label: History: heading
fields.value: A legacy of growth & responsibility.

fields.label: History: foundation
fields.value: The Legacy Begins: Asia Plywood Company was incorporated in Sungai Petani, establishing a vital foothold in the Malaysian timber industry.

fields.label: History: transition
fields.value: Modernization: Under the leadership of Mr. Tan Boon Huat, the company underwent a comprehensive management transformation, ushering in a new era of structural growth and operational modernization.

fields.label: History: next generation
fields.value: Leadership Succession: Mr. LK Tan assumed the role of CEO, spearheading the company's evolution for the next generation.

fields.label: History: rebranding
fields.value: Asia Green Wood: Formally transitioned from Asia Plywood to Asia Green Wood Sdn Bhd. This rebranding signifies our commitment to a broader “Green” vision within the Asia Green Group.

fields.label: Why us: heading
fields.value: Why choose Asia Green Wood.

fields.label: Call to action: heading
fields.value: Interested in our work?

fields.label: Call to action: copy
fields.value: Explore our operations or reach out to discuss timber supply, investment, or partnership opportunities.
